ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date on which the market data was recorded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* The opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* The highest price reached during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* The lowest price reached during the day */,
  "last_price" REAL /* The last recorded price of the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* The closing price of the financial instrument */,
  "total_trade_quantity" INTEGER /* The total quantity of trades for the day */,
  "turnover_lacs" REAL /* The total turnover in lakhs (Indian currency) */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* The volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* The market capitalization of the financial instrument for the day */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* The trading status of the instrument (e.g., open, closed, halted) */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the market data (e.g., NSE, BSE, external data provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market in which the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the instrument belongs */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* The International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the financial instrument */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* The Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) for the financial instrument */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* The Stock Exchange Daily Official List (SEDOL) for the financial instrument */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* The ticker symbol for the financial instrument */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* The date the financial instrument was listed on the market */,
  "delisting_date" TEXT /* The date the financial instrument was delisted from the market (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user for SMS alerts */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The user's account status (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument to be monitored */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* The condition that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* The message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* The date the alert was set up */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* The current status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert (e.g., price, volume, market depth) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* The threshold value for the alert condition */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* The channel for receiving notifications (e.g., email, SMS, dashboard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_triggers" (
  "trigger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert trigger event */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "market_data_date" TEXT /* The date of the market data that triggered the alert */,
  "triggered_price" REAL /* The price at which the alert was triggered */,
  "triggered_volume" INTEGER /* The volume at which the alert was triggered */,
  "trigger_time" TEXT /* The exact time the alert was triggered */,
  "triggered_market_depth" REAL /* The market depth at which the alert was triggered (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trigger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_triggers_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_triggers_market_data_date FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* The exact time of the access event */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_instruments" (
  "market_data_date" TEXT /* The date of the market data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument associated with the market data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the market data (e.g., NSE, BSE, external data provider) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* The quality of the market data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_date", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_sector_mapping" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector to which the instrument belongs */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* The name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* A description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "sector_id")
)
